name: Amazoness Heirloom
name_jp: アマゾネスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>秘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to an "Amazoness" monster. The first time the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. After damage calculation, if the equipped monster attacked a monster: Destroy the attacked monster.
eff: Equip only to an "Amazoness" monster. The first time the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle each turn, it is not destroyed. After damage calculation, if the equipped monster attacked a monster: Destroy the attacked monster.

mst: Destroys battling monster after damage calculation
